flavorText: Prefers cold climes and appears along coasts. It's an adorable little thing—as cute as any child—but it's also prideful, unwilling to accept handouts from people.

name: prinplup
flavorText: It swims gracefully through the frigid sea and sings with a voice like the roaring tide. It has powerful, sturdy wings and dignity to match.

name: empoleon
flavorText: Since ancient times, it has been revered by the people of Hisui, who call it the Master of the Waves. Its wings are a match for even master-crafted blades.

name: starly
flavorText: They live in the fields and mountains, gathering in large flocks. Their cries are quite obnoxious. Though small, their wings are strong—a strike from them leaves pain that persists for a week.

name: staravia
flavorText: They form remarkably large flocks and are constantly fighting amongst themselves. I suspect that those with magnificent plumes on their heads are the strong ones.

name: staraptor
flavorText: It has left the flock, having gained strength enough to survive on its own. The astounding force with which Staraptor flies through the air allows it to carry away large, burly targets.

name: bidoof
flavorText: Bidoof has an unsophisticated face and is rarely flustered by anything. There have been incidents involving Bidoof sauntering into villages and gnawing on the houses without a single care.

name: bibarel
flavorText: Bibarel fur repels water and is also a fantastic material for heat retention. These Pokémon create dams on rivers to live in.

name: kricketot
flavorText: When the trees take on new hues, more of these Pokémon appear. The tone they create by striking their antennae together resembles that of the marimba, an instrument of foreign lands.

name: kricketune
flavorText: It uses its cutlass-like arms to produce sound, the melody of which varies from individual to individual. It is a worthwhile endeavor to seek out one's favorite tunes.

name: shinx
flavorText: Shakes its body to generate electricity. Its stature belies its aggression—one must be patient to tame this Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 体毛通电后就会发光。 会摇晃明亮发光的尾巴 尖端来向伙伴发送信号。

name: luxio
flavorText: Proudly uses its electrified claws as weapons. It seems to be a gracious Pokémon, evenly sharing the spoils of the hunt with others of its kind.
flavorTextZh: 遇見敵人時會從腳伸出 有百萬伏特威力的爪子， 為對戰做好準備。

name: luxray
flavorText: They form packs, each having one male as leader. Legends say that when Luxray's two eyes shimmer with gold, the Pokémon can see through anything.
flavorTextZh: 由于透视需要消耗 大量的电能，因此它会 睡很长时间来积蓄能量。

name: budew
flavorText: When the sun's light strengthens, the bud atop this Pokémon's head opens. This is a sign to the people that the harsh winter is over, and the season of budding has begun.
flavorTextZh: 对气温的变化很敏感。 当它开始打开花苞， 便是冬去春来之时。

name: roserade
flavorText: Hidden within the bouquet on each hand are thorned whips loaded with virulent poison. Roserade moves gracefully as it corners its prey and mercilessly lashes them with its whips.
flavorTextZh: 右手的毒是速效的， 左手的毒则是慢性的。 无论哪边的毒性都能致命。

name: cranidos
flavorText: An incredibly rare sight. They duel each other by ramming their heads together, and the resulting sound echoes throughout the area like the pealing of a bell.
flavorTextZh: 坚硬的头盖骨是其特征。 会用头锤撞断树木， 吃树上结的树果。

name: rampardos
flavorText: Very little is known about its biology. Can knock down massive trees by smashing its beautiful, pearl-like crown against them.
flavorTextZh: 擅长头锤的古代宝可梦。 因为大脑真的很小， 所以也有说法它是因愚笨而灭亡的。

name: shieldon
flavorText: Much remains unknown about this Pokémon, as few have ever seen it. However, we know that it is calm and dislikes conflict, and it enjoys polishing its face against trees and rocks.
flavorTextZh: 虽然从太古时代的地层中 发现了它的化石， 但尚未发现除了脸以外的部分。

name: bastiodon
flavorText: Its face is sturdy—as strong as diamond—and this hardness offers a very stable defense. Much about this species is still unknown, such as its natural habitat.
flavorTextZh: 大约１亿年前的宝可梦。 极其结实的脸有着超越钢铁的硬度。

name: burmy
flavorText: If its cloak is even slightly damaged, Burmy will immediately repair it with whatever is close at hand. The Pokémon within the cloak is scrawny and vulnerable to the cold.

name: wormadam-plant
flavorText: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.

name: mothim
flavorText: Scatters steel-colored scales as it flaps its wings. Despite being observed feeding primarily on the nectar of flowers, Mothim is not often seen around flower gardens.

name: combee
flavorText: They swear fealty to a queen Pokémon and work diligently to gather nectar. Each swarm produces a different flavor of honey.
flavorTextZh: 从早到晚都在采集花蜜。 这一切都是为了 自己的族群和蜂女王。

name: vespiquen
flavorText: Commands its subjects to build its hive. It will dispatch any interlopers who dare sneak into its nest and use them as nourishment for itself.
flavorTextZh: 能释放越多费洛蒙的蜂女王， 就能让越多的三蜜蜂 听从自己的指挥。

name: pachirisu
flavorText: A species related to the Pikachu line. Though Pachirisu is a calm Pokémon, it still presents a danger should one touch its electrified tail or cheeks.

name: buizel
flavorText: It moves freely in the water by spinning its forked tail for propulsion. The resemblance to the screw of a steamboat is coincidental.

name: floatzel
flavorText: Has a long, rather splendid flotation sac, which prevents Floatzel from drowning even in stormy seas. One might glimpse this species around fishing hamlets from time to time.

name: cherubi
flavorText: Once the fruit growing alongside the main body is large and plump, Cherubi will use the nutrients within to evolve. The fruit then detaches, becoming nourishment for other creatures.
flavorTextZh: 身体越红的樱花宝 含有的营养越丰富， 味道也很甜很好吃。

name: cherrim
flavorText: Motionless, save for the occasional quiver. A rich array of Pokémon can be found gathered around it, drawn by the scent exuded from Cherrim's folded petals.
flavorTextZh: 盖起来的花瓣很硬。 即使被鸟宝可梦啄到， 也完全没问题。

name: shellos
flavorText: Found in abundance on seashores bordering warm waters. Shellos are unexpectedly friendly and will crawl toward any person they see. Take care not to get coated in mucus!
flavorTextZh: 如果用力按住它， 它就会分泌出神秘的紫色液体。 虽然液体无害，不过黏糊糊的。

name: gastrodon
flavorText: Eats beach sand for nourishment. Should one Gastrodon encounter another of a different color, a fierce battle will inevitably ensue.
flavorTextZh: 身体软瘫瘫的但十分强韧。 因为它身体的软度可以 帮助分散它所受到的冲击。

name: ambipom
flavorText: To affirm their kinship, members of this species will form a ring by linking their newly doubled tails together. On rare occasions, humans have been accepted into such rings.
flavorTextZh: 无论做什么都会用到尾巴。 如果被它的２条尾巴抱紧， 那就证明是真的和你很亲近。

name: drifloon
flavorText: Said to lure away young children and carry them off to the afterlife. Some whisper that Drifloon are formed of reincarnated human souls, but these rumors are as yet unconfirmed.
flavorTextZh: 因魂魄聚集在一起而诞生。 到了湿气大的季节 就有可能大量出现。

name: drifblim
flavorText: It drifts along at dusk, perfectly silent. Its transient, melancholy aspect touches some people deeply—every so often, one will come upon a song or poem devoted to Drifblim.
flavorTextZh: 会抓住人和宝可梦， 然后运到某个地方。 没人知道那地方是哪里。

name: buneary
flavorText: My hypothesis as to why Buneary rolls up its ears is that its hearing is far too keen. I surmise that the Pokémon protects its hearing by limiting the sound that may enter its ears.
flavorTextZh: 会利用把卷卷的耳朵伸直 时产生的威力进行攻击。 越训练，这一招式的威力就越强。

name: lopunny
flavorText: Its fur is warm and yet remarkably light. This Pokémon kicks as though it were a master of karate, driving back its opponents with ease.
flavorTextZh: 当高温的季节结束后， 就会换上富含空气的 体毛，准备抵御寒冷。

name: mismagius
flavorText: The incantations Mismagius chants can ward against misfortune, so a custom exists of inviting it into one's home. Incur the Pokémon's displeasure, however, and disaster will surely ensue.
flavorTextZh: 会吟诵诅咒的语言， 让对方极度头疼，或是看到 恐怖的幻觉，深受折磨。

name: honchkrow
flavorText: One cry from this Pokémon, and a murder of Murkrow come flying. At such times, one would think the curtain of night had fallen, plunging the world into jet-black darkness.
flavorTextZh: 和敌人战斗的基本都是跟班。 只有在最后刺入对手的致命一击 才会弄脏自己的手。

name: glameow
flavorText: Bewitches humans with its helical tail and piercing gaze. Its hidden claws are quite sharp as well, making this Pokémon an exceedingly tricky opponent if antagonized.

name: purugly
flavorText: Though impudent and difficult to tame, Purugly enjoys great popularity due to its fur, the beauty of which surpasses even velveteen.

name: chingling
flavorText: This Pokémon gave me an excruciating headache when it seemingly cried out without making a sound. Perhaps there are some sounds that the human ear is simply incapable of hearing.

name: stunky
flavorText: The poison that gushes from its aft end is accompanied by an utterly evil-smelling odor with such potency that one whiff can induce memory loss.
flavorTextZh: 要是它翘起尾巴把屁股对准了你， 请一定要小心。因为这表示它将要 喷出足以让人窒息的臭液。

name: skuntank
flavorText: Sprays a poisonous fluid to take down prey. Sometimes, unable to stomach the stench of its own fluid, it leaves the bested prey uneaten.
flavorTextZh: 从尾巴尖端喷出的液体 带有强烈的恶臭。 会在地面上挖洞建造巢穴。

name: bronzor
flavorText: Floats using a mysterious energy. The pattern engraved upon its back is held as sacred and can sometimes be found in imagery from ancient cemeteries and other such timeworn places.
flavorTextZh: 虽然人们说把铜镜怪打磨到发光， 它就能映照出真相， 但其实它非常讨厌被打磨。

name: bronzong
flavorText: Some believe that its bell-like cry opens holes to another world. It has been revered as a deity since ancient times.
flavorTextZh: 它身上的纹路让 许多学者都认为它 原本并不存在于伽勒尔。

name: bonsly
flavorText: Its tears elicit sympathy from those who see them, but do not be deceived! This expulsion of body water is merely a physiological mechanism for keeping itself in good health.
flavorTextZh: 栖息在空气干燥岩石裸露的地方。 空气越是干燥，它身上的绿球 就越是会泛出暗淡的光泽。

name: mime-jr
flavorText: Known to turn up in bustling marketplaces now and again. It mimics people much as a child would, then watches how they react, eyes sparkling.
flavorTextZh: 像徒弟一样跟随着 擅长跳舞的踏冰人偶， 拼命模仿它的舞步。

name: happiny
flavorText: In imitation of Chansey, it keeps a round stone tucked into its belly pouch and cherishes it dearly. It gets along well with children and will sometimes play house with them for fun.
flavorTextZh: 会把自己珍贵的浑圆石头 借给关系变得很要好的对象。 如果不还给它，它便会大哭大闹。

name: chatot
flavorText: A versatile performer skilled in the imitation of human speech. It is said that older, more experienced Chatot can even understand the meaning of the words they mimic.

name: spiritomb
flavorText: It lays curses by thinking wicked thoughts. Writings tell that this Pokémon was born out of the assembly of five score and eight malevolent spirits.
flavorTextZh: 总是作恶多端， 于是被使用神奇法术的 旅人绑缚在楔石里。

name: gible
flavorText: It nests in caves untouched by sunlight. Its sharp teeth may fall out when worn away or after an impact, but they regrow within a few days.
flavorTextZh: 遇到会动的东西就会扑上去 将其拉回到自己住的横洞内。 虽然嘴很大，但胃口却比较小。

name: gabite
flavorText: Though Gabite are usually of a violent disposition, when I gave one a glass bead it had been eyeing covetously, it suddenly became quite docile.
flavorTextZh: 会把宝石埋藏在栖息的洞窟内。 入侵者闯入洞窟后，会立刻 被它用爪子和牙齿撕碎。

name: garchomp
flavorText: Soars across the heavens at blinding speed—a magnificent sight! It has a feral disposition. Utmost caution is required if one meets a Garchomp out in the wilds.
flavorTextZh: 身手在陆地上也很矫捷， 在雪山上会赶在身体冻僵前 干掉猎物并返回住处。

name: munchlax
flavorText: Its robust stomach allows it to nonchalantly devour even rotted matter. It pays frequent visits to villages, seeking out food scraps intended for compost.
flavorTextZh: 在体毛下面储存食物。 如果是自己信赖的对象， 也会把食物分给对方一口。

name: riolu
flavorText: Though infantile in appearance, it has the mysterious ability to read the minds of humans. The pure of heart are met with Riolu's approval, while those of ill nature earn only its loathing.
flavorTextZh: 除了能读懂对手的感情， 也能以“波导”这种形式的波 来观察大自然的样子。

name: lucario
flavorText: A most gallant-looking creature. It emits energy waves and controls them with precision, using them to sense even faraway beings. I have given the name ”aura” to this power.
flavorTextZh: 他能理解人类的想法， 因此只会去亲近 内心端正的训练家。

name: hippopotas
flavorText: Though large and languid, Hippopotas is difficult to detect due to its tendency to burrow into and lurk beneath the soil. When agitated or excited, it expels sand from its nostrils.
flavorTextZh: 主要在白天活动。 因为沙漠的夜晚会降温， 所以会钻到沙子的深处睡觉。

name: hippowdon
flavorText: Short-tempered and easily moved to violence. It whips up whirlwinds of sand to crush its foes' spirits, then goes in for the attack.
flavorTextZh: 生气的时候非常凶暴。 会喷出储存在体内的 沙子来引发沙尘暴。

name: skorupi
flavorText: Its claws are not only razor-sharp but poisonous, making Skorupi a highly dangerous Pokémon. It seems to be weakened by cold temperatures, however.
flavorTextZh: 用尾巴上带毒的钩爪袭击对手。 一旦被夹住，毒素就会扩散开来， 导致全身无法动弹。

name: drapion
flavorText: Has a brutish, ferocious temperament. With immense strength and a sturdy shell off which swords will bounce, it rampages about and wreaks havoc.
flavorTextZh: 虽然狰狞凶猛到被人们 称为沙之恶魔，但在河马兽 面前却表现得低调温顺。

name: croagunk
flavorText: A poison wielder with a dastardly personality. Despite such qualities, this species is afforded a measure of popularity due to its peculiar cry and comical features.
flavorTextZh: 毒素在稀释后能制成药品。 它是制药公司的吉祥物， 广受众人的欢迎。

name: toxicroak
flavorText: Its crimson claws contain a virulent toxin. This toxin can be made into a tonic by diluting it, mixing it with several types of wild grass, and boiling it down over two days.
flavorTextZh: 制服了猎物之后， 便会呱呱地发出胜利的欢呼。 与蟾蜍王是相近的物种。

name: carnivine
flavorText: Though this is a plant Pokémon, it has a gluttonous and unruly temperament. Carnivine attacks its prey with its cavernous maw wide open.

name: finneon
flavorText: What a gorgeous sight this Pokémon is as it swims with its long, pink-painted caudal fins fluttering behind it. Finneon's beautiful appearance has led to its nickname: ”finery fish.”
flavorTextZh: 用发光的尾鳍引诱猎物。 白天会在海面附近， 到了夜里就向海的深处移动。

name: lumineon
flavorText: Uses its gleaming fins to hunt its prey. The view of Lumineon schooling near the surface of the sea at night is breathtaking— it's as though there were shining stars right there.
flavorTextZh: 像是爬行一样在深海的海底游泳。 鳍上发出的充满幻想的光 就像是夜空的星星。

name: mantyke
flavorText: Though ball-like in shape, this Pokémon is a proficient swimmer. I have discovered that if a Mantyke spends much time with schools of Remoraid, it will eventually achieve evolution.
flavorTextZh: 混在铁炮鱼的大群里游泳。 受到敌人袭击的时候， 会和铁炮鱼们并肩作战。

name: snover
flavorText: One is likely to encounter this Pokémon while out in the snow. There are stories of Snover appearing in human settlements but doing no harm—rather, they bond with the children.
flavorTextZh: 雪笠怪肚子上结出来的 口感好似冰棍的树果 是伽勒尔的火红不倒翁们的最爱。

name: abomasnow
flavorText: A powerful Pokémon that can split huge boulders with ease. Dislikes associating with others and chooses to live quietly deep within the mountains, playing with the snow.
flavorTextZh: 会引发暴风雪的宝可梦。 只要它摇动巨大的身体， 周围立刻会变得一片雪白。

name: weavile
flavorText: This species corners prey as a pack, under the guidance of a leader. Weavile displays increased cunning, leading me to speculate that its evolution caused further brain development.
flavorTextZh: 通过用爪子留下记号 来与伙伴联络。据说记号 的种类有５００种以上。

name: magnezone
flavorText: I theorize that a special magnetic field influenced this Pokémon, changing its molecular structure and causing it to evolve. It emits strange radio waves toward space from its antenna.
flavorTextZh: 人们认为，它是因为受到特殊 磁场的影响，身体的分子构造 发生了变化，才进化成这样的。

name: lickilicky
flavorText: Its tongue can extend and contract freely, and it is capable of reaching lengths over 10 times Lickilicky's height. Beware of the saliva, as it contains corrosive elements.
flavorTextZh: 舌头的灵巧程度甚至不输给 人手，没有它做不到的事。 相反，手指却相当笨拙，

name: rhyperior
flavorText: This Pokémon evolved through use of a curious item. Its rocklike hide is composed of a mysterious substance and can withstand a blow from a masterwork sword with nary a scratch.
flavorTextZh: 用护具弹开敌人的攻击， 在对手畏缩时用自己 引以为傲的钻头贯穿对方。

name: tangrowth
flavorText: Draped with long vines, it resembles a shrub in appearance. It swings bundles of vines as though they were arms, wrapping them around prey to ensnare them.
flavorTextZh: 栖息的地域越是温暖，藤蔓 生长得就越快。藤蔓变长后， 它会亲手将其扯断使其变短。

name: electivire
flavorText: Its evolution was induced by an unusual item, and its electrical output rises along with its heart rate. From its tails, it can unleash an electric current measuring 20,000 volts.
flavorTextZh: 发电量在电气宝可梦当中 属于最高级别。可以从 尾巴尖端释放高压电流。

name: magmortar
flavorText: Use of a strange item caused this Pokémon to evolve. Fireballs launched from the ends of its tubelike arms are hot enough to melt an iron pot in an instant.
flavorTextZh: 由于栖息在火山口，因此 身体逐渐变得像火山一样， 还长着类似岩浆库的器官。

name: togekiss
flavorText: Scant few have ever sighted this Pokémon. After studying what literature remains, I am certain Togekiss will reveal itself when peace reigns in the land.
flavorTextZh: 被称为会带来恩惠的宝可梦， 从很久很久以前开始， 人们就视它为吉祥之物。

name: yanmega
flavorText: Extremely violent. When hunting, it wastes none of its energy, aiming only for prey's most vulnerable spots. Any who manage to tame this Pokémon must be of incredible bravery.

name: leafeon
flavorText: Cells similar to those of plants have been found in its fur. Its hard tail can fell a large tree with one stroke, and the tail's sharpness exceeds even that of a sword crafted by a master.
flavorTextZh: 尾巴好似锐利的刀刃， 锋利得无与伦比， 连大树都能一斩为二。

name: glaceon
flavorText: Glaceon is able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around.
flavorTextZh: 冰伊布释放出的冷气能 制造出粉状的雪。这使它受到 各个滑雪场的热烈欢迎。

name: gliscor
flavorText: It glides soundlessly on pitch-black wings and sinks sharp fangs into the throat of its prey. It takes on a look of satisfaction once it has entirely drained its prey of blood.

name: mamoswine
flavorText: This species reached its zenith during the period known as the ice age. I suspect that Hisui's frigid climate is in harmony with Mamoswine's constitution, thus awakening hidden potential.
flavorTextZh: 它的力量就如外表那样强大。 天气越是寒冷，它的冰牙 就会长得越粗、越长、越结实。

name: porygon-z
flavorText: A curious item induced this evolution. The Pokémon's offensive capabilities have greatly increased, but the strangeness of its behavior has magnified in equal measure. This worries me.
flavorTextZh: 有人说它是通过追加程序进化的， 但关于它的改变是否真是进化， 在学会中也存在着意见分歧。

name: gallade
flavorText: The blades extending from its elbows are sharper than the finest swords. Its swordsmanship, albeit self-taught, is astonishingly impressive.
flavorTextZh: 能够敏锐地感知到 寻求帮助的感情， 并且火速赶去援助对方。

name: probopass
flavorText: It is able to emit powerful magnetism, allowing it control over the iron sand that forms its luscious mustache. Using this iron sand, Probopass forms hard stones with which it smites its prey.
flavorTextZh: 使用３个小部件获取食物， 或是和敌人战斗。 本体基本上只负责下命令。

name: dusknoir
flavorText: Comes to those whose lives have come to an end and escorts their souls to the afterlife. Known to mistakenly take the souls of those who yet have life left in them, albeit rarely.
flavorTextZh: 用腹部的嘴将猎物整个吞下。 只会吃掉对方的魂魄， 离去时会把肉体吐出来。

name: froslass
flavorText: A Pokémon inhabited by the soul of a woman who died bearing a grudge in the snowy mountains. Legends of Froslass placing deathly curses on misbehaving men send shivers down my spine.
flavorTextZh: 会吐出零下５０度的冷气 冻住猎物，并把它们带回 自己的巢穴，整齐地摆成一排。

name: rotom
flavorText: This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.
flavorTextZh: 会用由离子构成的身体 潜入各种各样的机器里。 最喜欢恶作剧吓人。

name: uxie
flavorText: A Pokémon feared but also respected for stealing away the memories of evildoers. I have found records that suggest Uxie holds dominion over knowledge.

name: mesprit
flavorText: Known as the Being of Emotion. In legend, this Pokémon was feared, as any who showed disrespect would have their emotions thrown into disarray.

name: azelf
flavorText: The dreaded Being of Willpower. Legends tell of this Pokémon manipulating the will of its adversaries and turning them into puppets of its own.

name: dialga
flavorText: This Pokémon is revered as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Dialga was what caused the vast river of time to begin flowing in our world.

name: palkia
flavorText: This Pokémon is feared as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Palkia was what caused the walls of our world to disappear, creating a sky that spans for infinity.

name: heatran
flavorText: Stories tell of this Pokémon being birthed from the boiling magma within Mount Coronet. Its molten-steel body holds many mysteries.

name: regigigas
flavorText: According to legend, Regigigas pulled landmasses together and bound them with rope to create the continent of Hisui. Though I have my doubts, the story could well contain a shred of truth.
flavorTextZh: 据说它用各种各样的材料 制作了宝可梦后，把大陆 移动到了现在的位置。

name: giratina-altered
flavorText: There is one Hisuian verse that tells of a powerful light creating a deep shadow. I imagine that this deep shadow is Giratina.

name: cresselia
flavorText: Cresselia is reminiscent of the crescent moon. It leaves a brilliant line of light in its wake as it flies across the night sky. I daresay it resembles the heavenly maiden who created the Milky Way.

name: phione
flavorText: Can be seen floating offshore during seasons when the seas are warm. Its azure body blends in with the ocean waters—logic suggests this is a defense mechanism against natural predators.

name: manaphy
flavorText: Rumored to migrate across the oceans and visit Hisui's coastal waters only rarely. Although Manaphy resembles Phione, it is also quite different. The relation between the two is unclear.

name: darkrai
flavorText: On a moonless night, a strange incident occurred in which every one of a village's inhabitants suffered nightmares. The villagers attested that Darkrai appeared before them in these nightmares.

name: shaymin-land
flavorText: When the turning of seasons brings the cruel winter to its end and the joyous people give thanks to the heavens, Shaymin appears and covers the withered land with flowers.

name: arceus
flavorText: It is the heavenly fount from which pours the light that shines across Hisui. Its luminance guides and protects all Pokémon. Hisuian mythology states that Arceus is the creator of all things.

name: victini
flavorText: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.

name: snivy
flavorText: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

name: servine
flavorText: When it gets dirty, its leaves can’t be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.

name: serperior
flavorText: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.

name: tepig
flavorText: It loves to eat roasted berries, but sometimes it gets too excited and burns them to a crisp.

name: pignite
flavorText: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

name: emboar
flavorText: It has mastered fast and powerful fighting moves. It grows a beard of fire.

name: oshawott
flavorText: This Pokémon from the Unova region uses the shell on its belly as a weapon to cut down its foes. Thus, I've conferred upon this shell the name ”scalchop”.

name: dewott
flavorText: Its exquisite double-scalchop technique is likely the result of daily training, and it can send even masters of the blade fleeing in defeat.

name: samurott
flavorText: Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon's evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.

name: patrat
flavorText: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.

name: watchog
flavorText: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

name: lillipup
flavorText: This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won’t forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.
flavorTextZh: 比普通的小孩子还要 聪明许多。对于得到的关爱 和受到的伤害都不会忘怀。

name: herdier
flavorText: The black fur that covers this Pokémon’s body is dense and springy. Even sharp fangs bounce right off.
flavorTextZh: 覆盖在身上的黑色体毛 既厚又有弹性，甚至能 把尖锐的牙齿也反弹回去。

name: stoutland
flavorText: Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It’s said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.
flavorTextZh: 以自己气派的胡须为傲。 据说，每只个体在族群中的地位， 就是根据胡须长度来决定的。

name: purrloin
flavorText: Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable behavior come away with stinging scratches from its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.
flavorTextZh: 会用可爱的动作让对手放下戒心， 趁对方靠过来时冷不防地用爪子 猛抓，然后得意地大笑。

name: liepard
flavorText: This stealthy Pokémon sneaks up behind prey without making any sound at all. It competes with Thievul for territory.
flavorTextZh: 和猾大狐争抢地盘。 能够悄无声息地 从背后偷偷靠近猎物。

name: pansage
flavorText: It’s good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It’s kind enough to share them with friends.

name: simisage
flavorText: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

name: pansear
flavorText: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: simisear
flavorText: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

name: panpour
flavorText: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

name: simipour
flavorText: It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.

name: munna
flavorText: It eats dreams and releases mist. The mist is pink when it’s eating a good dream, and black when it’s eating a nightmare.
flavorTextZh: 在吃掉梦之后会吐出烟雾。 吃了快乐的梦时，烟雾是粉红色的； 如果是噩梦，烟雾则是黑灰色的。

name: musharna
flavorText: It drowses and dreams all the time. It’s best to leave it be if it’s just woken up, as it’s a terrible grump when freshly roused from sleep.
flavorTextZh: 总是在打瞌睡做梦。 刚睡醒的时候会闹脾气， 所以最好别去招惹它。

name: pidove
flavorText: It’s forgetful and not very bright, but many Trainers love it anyway for its friendliness and sincerity.
flavorTextZh: 虽然既健忘又不太聪明， 因为性格认真且容易亲近人， 所以受到了许多训练家的喜爱。

name: tranquill
flavorText: These bright Pokémon have acute memories. Apparently delivery workers often choose them as their partners.
flavorTextZh: 头脑聪明而且记性很好。 似乎有许多快递员 将它选为自己的搭档。

name: unfezant
flavorText: This Pokémon is intelligent and intensely proud. People will sit up and take notice if you become the Trainer of one.
flavorTextZh: 头脑聪明，所以自尊心也强。 如果能成为高傲雉鸡的训练家， 所有人都会对你刮目相看。

name: blitzle
flavorText: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.

name: zebstrika
flavorText: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: roggenrola
flavorText: When it detects a noise, it starts to move. The energy core inside it makes this Pokémon slightly warm to the touch.
flavorTextZh: 会对声音产生反应而动起来。 在能量核心的影响下， 它摸起来暖暖的。

name: boldore
flavorText: It relies on sound in order to monitor what’s in its vicinity. When angered, it will attack without ever changing the direction it’s facing.
flavorTextZh: 通过声音来探测四周。 要是惹它生气了，它会连 身体方向也不转就朝你追来。

name: gigalith
flavorText: Although its energy blasts can blow away a dump truck, they have a limitation— they can only be fired when the sun is out.
flavorTextZh: 它射出的能量弹具有 可以击飞翻斗车的破坏力。 不过只有在晴天才能射击。

name: woobat
flavorText: It emits ultrasonic waves as it flutters about, searching for its prey—bug Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 一边发出超音波，一边 飞来飞去寻找虫宝可梦 来填饱自己的肚子。

name: swoobat
flavorText: The auspicious shape of this Pokémon’s nose apparently led some regions to consider Swoobat a symbol of good luck.
flavorTextZh: 据说有些地区的人觉得 它鼻子的形状很吉利， 而把它当成幸福的象征来祭拜。

name: drilbur
flavorText: It’s a digger, using its claws to burrow through the ground. It causes damage to vegetable crops, so many farmers have little love for it.
flavorTextZh: 会用爪子在地底挖掘前进。 一些农民因为担心它会 因此糟蹋蔬菜而讨厌它。

name: excadrill
flavorText: Known as the Drill King, this Pokémon can tunnel through the terrain at speeds of over 90 mph.
flavorTextZh: 别名钻头王。在地底下 挖掘前进的速度 达到了每小时１５０公里。

name: audino
flavorText: This Pokémon has a kind heart. By touching with its feelers, Audino can gauge other creatures’ feelings and physical conditions.
flavorTextZh: 心地善良的宝可梦。 通过触角接触，就能了解 对方的心情和身体状况。

name: timburr
flavorText: Timburr that have started carrying logs that are about three times their size are nearly ready to evolve.
flavorTextZh: 如果搬运小匠可以搬起 自己体重３倍左右的方材， 就代表它进化的日子要到了。

name: gurdurr
flavorText: Gurdurr excels at demolition—construction is not its forte. In any case, there’s skill in the way this Pokémon wields its metal beam.
flavorTextZh: 能够灵巧地操纵工字钢。 虽然对拆除得心应手， 但却不太擅长组装。

name: conkeldurr
flavorText: When going all out, this Pokémon throws aside its concrete pillars and leaps at opponents to pummel them with its fists.
flavorTextZh: 要是认真起来就会 扔掉手中的混凝土柱， 赤手空拳地扑向敌人。

name: tympole
flavorText: It uses sound waves to communicate with others of its kind. People and other Pokémon species can’t hear its cries of warning.
flavorTextZh: 通过音波来联系伙伴。 人类和其他宝可梦都 听不见它发出的警告声。

name: palpitoad
flavorText: On occasion, their cries are sublimely pleasing to the ear. Palpitoad with larger lumps on their bodies can sing with a wider range of sounds.
flavorTextZh: 有时也会发出悦耳的叫声。 身上突起物越大的蓝蟾蜍 越能在更广的音域来鸣叫。

name: seismitoad
flavorText: This Pokémon is popular among the elderly, who say the vibrations of its lumps are great for massages.
flavorTextZh: 在老年人之间广受欢迎。 因为他们觉得它身上的瘤 发出的震动拿来按摩刚刚好。

name: throh
flavorText: They train in groups of five. Any member that can’t keep up will discard its belt and leave the group.
flavorTextZh: ５只一组一起努力练习。 在练习中掉队的投摔鬼 会扔掉带子离开团队。

name: sawk
flavorText: The karate chops of a Sawk that’s trained itself to the limit can cleave the ocean itself.
flavorTextZh: 不断重复练习的打击鬼 所使出的空手劈拥有 足以劈开大海的破坏力。

name: sewaddle
flavorText: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

name: swadloon
flavorText: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.

name: leavanny
flavorText: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

name: venipede
flavorText: Its fangs are highly venomous. If this Pokémon finds prey it thinks it can eat, it leaps for them without any thought of how things might turn out.
flavorTextZh: 牙齿上有剧毒。一旦 发现看上去能吃的猎物， 就会不假思索地扑上去。

name: whirlipede
flavorText: Whirlipede protects itself with a sturdy shell and poisonous spikes while it stores up the energy it’ll need for evolution.
flavorTextZh: 用坚硬的壳和带毒的刺 保护自己的身体， 积蓄进化所需的能量。

name: scolipede
flavorText: Scolipede engage in fierce territorial battles with Centiskorch. At the end of one of these battles, the victor makes a meal of the loser.
flavorTextZh: 会和焚焰蚣激烈地争夺 领地。输掉的那一方 会成为另一方的猎物。

name: cottonee
flavorText: Weaving together the cotton of both Cottonee and Eldegoss produces exquisite cloth that’s highly prized by many luxury brands.
flavorTextZh: 将木棉球和白蓬蓬的棉花 混合后编织出的布料极其精致， 因此常被高级品牌选用。

name: whimsicott
flavorText: As long as this Pokémon bathes in sunlight, its cotton keeps growing. If too much cotton fluff builds up, Whimsicott tears it off and scatters it.
flavorTextZh: 每当沐浴阳光，身上的棉花 就会膨胀。如果膨胀过了头， 它就会把棉花扯开到处乱撒。

name: petilil
flavorText: The leaves on its head are highly valued for medicinal purposes. Dry the leaves in the sun, boil them, and then drink the bitter decoction for remarkably effective relief from fatigue.
flavorTextZh: 叶子的颜色越深就越健康。 有时也会在被精心照料过的 田地或花坛里定居下来。

name: lilligant
flavorText: I suspect that its well-developed legs are the result of a life spent on mountains covered in deep snow. The scent it exudes from its flower crown heartens those in proximity.
flavorTextZh: 用它的花朵制成的精油 虽有着极致香气，但价格 同时也贵得令人大跌眼镜。

name: basculin-red-striped
flavorText: Though it differs from other Basculin in several respects, including demeanor—this one is gentle—I have categorized it as a regional form given the vast array of shared qualities.
flavorTextZh: 从前也曾经登上餐桌。 红条纹野蛮鲈鱼的肉脂肪含量高， 适合年轻人食用。

name: sandile
flavorText: Sandile is small, but its legs and lower body are powerful. Pushing sand aside as it goes, Sandile moves through the desert as if it’s swimming.
flavorTextZh: 个头虽小，腰腿却很有力。 会拨开沙子，在沙漠里 犹如游泳般地自在移动。

name: krokorok
flavorText: Although this Pokémon has specialized eyes that allow it to see in the dark, Krokorok won’t move much at night—the desert gets cold after sunset.
flavorTextZh: 虽然拥有能在黑暗中看清事物的 特殊双眼，但由于沙漠的夜晚寒冷， 所以一般不怎么活动。

name: krookodile
flavorText: While terribly aggressive, Krookodile also has the patience to stay hidden under sand for days, lying in wait for prey.
flavorTextZh: 虽然凶暴，但也有擅长忍耐的一面。 为了捕获猎物，可以在 沙子里静静等上好几天。

name: darumaka
flavorText: This popular symbol of good fortune will never fall over in its sleep, no matter how it’s pushed or pulled.
flavorTextZh: 在它睡觉的时候， 无论是推是拉，它都不会倒下。 因为象征着吉利而大受欢迎。

name: darmanitan-standard
flavorText: This Pokémon’s power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.
flavorTextZh: 体内的火焰燃得越旺， 力量就越大。火焰的温度 有时甚至能超过１４００度。

name: maractus
flavorText: Once each year, this Pokémon scatters its seeds. They’re jam-packed with nutrients, making them a precious food source out in the desert.
flavorTextZh: 一年散播一次种子。 花的种子营养十足， 是沙漠中贵重的食粮。

name: dwebble
flavorText: It first tries to find a rock to live in, but if there are no suitable rocks to be found, Dwebble may move in to the ports of a Hippowdon.
flavorTextZh: 如果找不到大小合适 的石头来当成自己的家， 它也会住到河马兽的洞里。

name: crustle
flavorText: Its thick claws are its greatest weapons. They’re mighty enough to crack Rhyperior’s carapace.
flavorTextZh: 厚实的钳子是它最大的武器。 硬度高到甚至能让 超甲狂犀的护具裂开。

name: scraggy
flavorText: It protects itself with its durable skin. It’s thought that this Pokémon will evolve once its skin has completely stretched out.
flavorTextZh: 用结实的皮保护身体。 据说在皮伸展到极限时， 它就会开始进化。

name: scrafty
flavorText: While mostly known for having the temperament of an aggressive ruffian, this Pokémon takes very good care of its family, friends, and territory.
flavorTextZh: 虽然性格非常粗鲁， 但也有重视家族、 伙伴和领地的另一面。

name: sigilyph
flavorText: A discovery was made in the desert where Sigilyph fly. The ruins of what may have been an ancient city were found beneath the sands.
flavorTextZh: 人們在象徵鳥飛過的沙漠 地下進行調查，結果在那裡 發現了疑似古代都市的遺跡。

name: yamask
flavorText: The spirit of a person from a bygone age became this Pokémon. It rambles through ruins, searching for someone who knows its face.
flavorTextZh: 古代人的灵魂变成了宝可梦。 为了寻找认得自己长相的人 而在遗迹里徘徊。

name: cofagrigus
flavorText: There are many depictions of Cofagrigus decorating ancient tombs. They’re symbols of the wealth that kings of bygone eras had.
flavorTextZh: 迭失棺象征着国王的财富， 因此许多古墓里 都有它的壁画。

name: tirtouga
flavorText: Tirtouga is considered to be the ancestor of many turtle Pokémon. It was restored to life from a fossil.
flavorTextZh: 由化石复活的宝可梦。 人们认为它是很多 龟宝可梦的祖先。

name: carracosta
flavorText: This Pokémon emerges from the water in search of prey despite the fact that it moves more slowly on land.
flavorTextZh: 虽然和在水中相比动作 会变得迟缓，但是为了寻找 猎物也会登上陆地活动。

name: archen
flavorText: Archen is said to be the ancestor of bird Pokémon. It lived in treetops, eating berries and bug Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 被称为鸟宝可梦的祖先。 栖息在树上，以树果和 虫宝可梦为食。

name: archeops
flavorText: Though capable of flight, Archeops was apparently better at hunting on the ground.
flavorTextZh: 虽然也会飞行， 但是似乎更擅长在 地面上捕捉猎物。

name: trubbish
flavorText: This Pokémon was born from a bag stuffed with trash. Galarian Weezing relish the fumes belched by Trubbish.
flavorTextZh: 诞生于塞满垃圾的垃圾袋里。 它嘴里喷出的毒气 是伽勒尔双弹瓦斯的最爱。

name: garbodor
flavorText: The toxic liquid it launches from its right arm is so virulent that it can kill a weakened creature instantly.
flavorTextZh: 从右臂喷出的毒液十分危险， 虚弱的生物只要一沾到， 立刻就会丢掉性命。

name: zorua
flavorText: A once-departed soul, returned to life in Hisui. Derives power from resentment, which rises as energy atop its head and takes on the forms of foes. In this way, Zorua vents lingering malice.
flavorTextZh: 为了寻找食物，有时甚至会 幻化成人类出现在城镇里。 多数情况下会幻化成小孩。

name: zoroark
flavorText: With its disheveled white fur, it looks like an embodiment of death. Heedless of its own safety, Zoroark attacks its nemeses with a bitter energy so intense, it lacerates Zoroark's own body.
flavorTextZh: 孤独的训练家会命令 索罗亚克为自己展现幻像， 借以排遣孤身一人的寂寞。

name: minccino
flavorText: They pet each other with their tails as a form of greeting. Of the two, the one whose tail is fluffier is a bit more boastful.
flavorTextZh: 用尾巴互相抚摸来打招呼。 尾巴的毛比较蓬松的那一方 会表现得稍微威风些。

name: cinccino
flavorText: A special oil that seeps through their fur helps them avoid attacks. The oil fetches a high price at market.
flavorTextZh: 覆盖着特别油脂的毛发 可以挡住攻击。这种油 以高价在市场上流通。

name: gothita
flavorText: Even when nobody seems to be around, Gothita can still be heard making a muted cry. Many believe it’s speaking to something only it can see.
flavorTextZh: 哥德宝宝会在看似无人的地方 轻声地叫。它好像是在与某种 只有它才看得见的东西说话。

name: gothorita
flavorText: On nights when the stars shine, this Pokémon’s psychic power is at its strongest. It’s unknown just what link Gothorita has to the greater universe.
flavorTextZh: 哥德小童的精神力量似乎会 在星光闪耀的夜晚达到最高点。 它与宇宙的关系至今不明。

name: gothitelle
flavorText: A criminal who was shown his fate by a Gothitelle went missing that same day and was never seen again.
flavorTextZh: 从哥德小姐那里 看到了自己下场的恶人 在那之后便销声匿迹了。

name: solosis
flavorText: Many say that the special liquid covering this Pokémon’s body would allow it to survive in the vacuum of space.
flavorTextZh: 身体被特殊的液体包裹着， 许多人因此认为它 即使在宇宙中也能存活。

name: duosion
flavorText: Its brain has split into two, and the two halves rarely think alike. Its actions are utterly unpredictable.
flavorTextZh: 由于它一分为二的大脑 思考的内容几乎完全不同， 导致它的行动非常难以预测。

name: reuniclus
flavorText: It’s said that drinking the liquid surrounding Reuniclus grants wisdom. Problem is, the liquid is highly toxic to anything besides Reuniclus itself.
flavorTextZh: 虽然有人说只要喝掉它特殊的液体 就能得到智慧，但对人造细胞卵 以外来说，那其实是剧毒。

name: ducklett
flavorText: They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.

name: swanna
flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

name: vanillite
flavorText: Supposedly, this Pokémon was born from an icicle. It spews out freezing air at −58 degrees Fahrenheit to make itself more comfortable.
flavorTextZh: 据说它是从冰柱中诞生的。 为了能让自己生活得更舒适， 会吐出零下５０度的冷气冻住四周。

name: vanillish
flavorText: It blasts enemies with cold air reaching −148 degrees Fahrenheit, freezing them solid. But it spares their lives afterward—it’s a kind Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 性格和善，虽然会用 零下１００度的冷气冻住敌人， 但并不会伤及它们的性命。

name: vanilluxe
flavorText: People believe this Pokémon formed when two Vanillish stuck together. Its body temperature is roughly 21 degrees Fahrenheit.
flavorTextZh: 体温在零下６度左右。 据说是由２只多多冰 贴在一起而诞生的。

name: deerling
flavorText: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon’s fur. People use it to mark the seasons.

name: sawsbuck
flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons, so some people call Sawsbuck the harbingers of spring.

name: emolga
flavorText: This Pokémon absolutely loves sweet berries. Sometimes it stuffs its cheeks full of so much food that it can’t fly properly.
flavorTextZh: 最喜欢甜甜的树果。有时也会 因为在脸颊的袋子里囤了太多 食物而无法好好飞行。

name: karrablast
flavorText: It spits a liquid from its mouth to melt through Shelmet’s shell. Karrablast doesn’t eat the shell— it eats only the contents.
flavorTextZh: 用嘴里吐出的液体 来溶化小嘴蜗的壳， 只会去吃里面的身体。

name: escavalier
flavorText: It charges its enemies, lances at the ready. An image of one of its duels is captured in a famous painting of Escavalier clashing with Sirfetch’d.
flavorTextZh: 会举起长矛突击敌人。 有一幅名画描绘着 它和葱游兵决斗的场景。

name: foongus
flavorText: The spores released from this Pokémon’s hands are highly poisonous, but when thoroughly dried, the spores can be used as stomach medicine.
flavorTextZh: 从双手喷出的孢子虽然 含有剧毒，但据说彻底干燥后 可以用作治疗肠胃的药。

name: amoonguss
flavorText: Amoonguss generally doesn’t move much. It tends to stand still near Poké Balls that have been dropped on the ground.
flavorTextZh: 平常一般不太动。 只是一动不动地待在 掉落于地面的精灵球旁边。

name: frillish-male
flavorText: Legend has it that the residents of a sunken ancient city changed into these Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 据流传至今的传说里所述， 它是由沉没到海底的古代都市 的居民变成的宝可梦。

name: jellicent-male
flavorText: Whenever a full moon hangs in the night sky, schools of Jellicent gather near the surface of the sea, waiting for their prey to appear.
flavorTextZh: 每到满月时，胖嘟嘟会 成群结队地来到海面上。 这么做是为了等待猎物上门。

name: alomomola
flavorText: The reason it helps Pokémon in a weakened condition is that any Pokémon coming after them may also attack Alomomola.
flavorTextZh: 之所以会救助体弱的宝可梦， 好像是因为盯上它们的 宝可梦也会攻击它自己。

name: joltik
flavorText: Joltik latch on to other Pokémon and suck out static electricity. They’re often found sticking to Yamper’s hindquarters.
flavorTextZh: 会附在其他宝可梦身上 吸取静电。经常会把自己 贴在来电汪的屁股上。

name: galvantula
flavorText: It lays traps of electrified threads near the nests of bird Pokémon, aiming to snare chicks that are not yet good at flying.
flavorTextZh: 为了捕捉不太会飞的幼鸟， 会在鸟宝可梦的巢穴附近 用带电的丝设下陷阱。

name: ferroseed
flavorText: Mossy caves are their preferred dwellings. Enzymes contained in mosses help Ferroseed’s spikes grow big and strong.
flavorTextZh: 偏爱长着青苔的洞窟。 青苔中所含的酶能使它的 尖刺成长得又大又结实。

name: ferrothorn
flavorText: Its spikes are harder than steel. This Pokémon crawls across rock walls by stabbing the spikes on its feelers into the stone.
flavorTextZh: 拥有比钢铁还坚硬的尖刺。 会利用触手上的尖刺 攀附在岩壁上移动。

name: klink
flavorText: It’s suspected that Klink were the inspiration behind ancient people’s invention of the first gears.
flavorTextZh: 据说在很久以前， 是看到了齿轮儿的人 发明了齿轮的构造。

name: klang
flavorText: Many companies in the Galar region choose Klang as their logo. This Pokémon is considered the symbol of industrial technology.
flavorTextZh: 被认为是工业技术的象征。 有许多伽勒尔当地的公司 选择它作为企业的标志。

name: klinklang
flavorText: The three gears that compose this Pokémon spin at high speed. Its new spiked gear isn’t a living creature.
flavorTextZh: 让３个齿轮高速旋转。 新增出来的那个带着 尖刺的齿轮并不是生物。

name: tynamo
flavorText: One alone can emit only a trickle of electricity, so a group of them gathers to unleash a powerful electric shock.

name: eelektrik
flavorText: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

name: eelektross
flavorText: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

name: elgyem
flavorText: This Pokémon was discovered about 50 years ago. Its highly developed brain enables it to exert its psychic powers.
flavorTextZh: 在大约５０年前被发现的宝可梦。 会用又大又发达的大脑 操纵精神力量。

name: beheeyem
flavorText: Sometimes found drifting above wheat fields, this Pokémon can control the memories of its opponents.
flavorTextZh: 能控制对方的记忆。 经常有人看到它 在麦田的上方徘徊。

name: litwick
flavorText: The younger the life this Pokémon absorbs, the brighter and eerier the flame on its head burns.
flavorTextZh: 吸取到的灵魂越年轻， 头上的烛光就会 燃烧得越旺越诡异。

name: lampent
flavorText: It lurks in cities, pretending to be a lamp. Once it finds someone whose death is near, it will trail quietly after them.
flavorTextZh: 伪装成灯的样子藏身在城镇里。 一旦发现了临近死期的人， 便会悄悄地跟在后面。

name: chandelure
flavorText: In homes illuminated by Chandelure instead of lights, funerals were a constant occurrence— or so it’s said.
flavorTextZh: 据说在用水晶灯火灵 来充当照明设备的房子里， 丧事会接连不断。

name: axew
flavorText: They play with each other by knocking their large tusks together. Their tusks break sometimes, but they grow back so quickly that it isn’t a concern.
flavorTextZh: 会和伙伴们一起互撞牙齿来玩。 折断的牙齿会马上长出来， 所以丝毫都不会去在意。

name: fraxure
flavorText: Its skin is as hard as a suit of armor. Fraxure’s favorite strategy is to tackle its opponents, stabbing them with its tusks at the same time.
flavorTextZh: 皮肤像盔甲一样坚硬。 非常擅长在撞击的同时 用牙齿猛刺的战法。

name: haxorus
flavorText: While usually kindhearted, it can be terrifying if angered. Tusks that can slice through steel beams are how Haxorus deals with its adversaries.
flavorTextZh: 性格温和，但生起气来非常恐怖。 会用自己那引以为傲，可以 削铁如泥的牙齿攻击敌人。

name: cubchoo
flavorText: It sniffles before performing a move, using its frosty snot to provide an icy element to any move that needs it.
flavorTextZh: 使出招式前会先倒吸鼻涕。 鼻涕里所含有的强烈冷气 是冰属性招式的能量来源。

name: beartic
flavorText: It swims energetically through frigid seas. When it gets tired, it freezes the seawater with its breath so it can rest on the ice.
flavorTextZh: 在冰冷的大海里精力十足地游泳。 感到疲劳的时候会吐出气息 冻结海水，在冰面上休息。

name: cryogonal
flavorText: When the weather gets hot, these Pokémon turn into water vapor. Cryogonal are almost never seen during summer.
flavorTextZh: 天气一热就会化为水蒸气。 到了夏天几乎到处都 看不到它的踪影。

name: shelmet
flavorText: It has a strange physiology that responds to electricity. When together with Karrablast, Shelmet evolves for some reason.
flavorTextZh: 有着会对电能产生反应 的奇异体质。不知为何， 和盖盖虫待在一起就会进化。

name: accelgor
flavorText: Discarding its shell made it nimble. To keep itself from dehydrating, it wraps its body in bands of membrane.
flavorTextZh: 脱壳后变得更轻巧了。 为了防止干燥，会将 带状的粘膜裹在身上。

name: stunfisk
flavorText: For some reason, this Pokémon smiles slightly when it emits a strong electric current from the yellow markings on its body.
flavorTextZh: 当从身上的黄色斑纹 里释放出强大电流时， 它会莫名地露出微笑。

name: mienfoo
flavorText: Though small, Mienfoo’s temperament is fierce. Any creature that approaches Mienfoo carelessly will be greeted with a flurry of graceful attacks.
flavorTextZh: 个头虽小脾气却很暴躁。 面对疏忽大意接近自己的 对手，会施展出华丽的连击。

name: mienshao
flavorText: Delivered at blinding speeds, kicks from this Pokémon can shatter massive boulders into tiny pieces.
flavorTextZh: 以迅雷不及掩耳的速度 使出踢击，即使是巨大的 岩石也能击得粉碎。

name: druddigon
flavorText: Druddigon are vicious and cunning. They take up residence in nests dug out by other Pokémon, treating the stolen nests as their own lairs.
flavorTextZh: 性情凶暴而狡猾。 会把其他宝可梦挖出的巢穴 抢来当做自己的住处。

name: golett
flavorText: This Pokémon was created from clay. It received orders from its master many thousands of years ago, and it still follows those orders to this day.
flavorTextZh: 用黏土制成的宝可梦。 即使现在也一直遵循着 数千年前主人的命令。

name: golurk
flavorText: There’s a theory that inside Golurk is a perpetual motion machine that produces limitless energy, but this belief hasn’t been proven.
flavorTextZh: 虽然有人认为它体内 有着生成能量的永动机， 但至今仍未得到证实。

name: pawniard
flavorText: A pack of these Pokémon forms to serve a Bisharp boss. Each Pawniard trains diligently, dreaming of one day taking the lead.
flavorTextZh: 以劈斩司令为首领组成族群。 目标是有朝一日能统领同类， 所以每天都在不懈地锻炼。

name: bisharp
flavorText: Violent conflicts erupt between Bisharp and Fraxure over places where sharpening stones can be found.
flavorTextZh: 为了抢占能找到磨刀石 的地方，和斧牙龙展开了 激烈的斗争。

name: bouffalant
flavorText: These Pokémon live in herds of about 20 individuals. Bouffalant that betray the herd will lose the hair on their heads for some reason.
flavorTextZh: 会以约２０只的规模群居。 不知为何，背叛了族群的 爆炸头水牛脑袋上的毛会脱落。

name: rufflet
flavorText: Its chick-like looks belie its hotheadedness. It challenges its parents at every opportunity, desperate to prove its strength.
flavorTextZh: 握力强，能把坚硬的树果 弄得粉碎。性急爱吵架， 无论对谁都会挑起战斗。

name: braviary
flavorText: Screaming a bloodcurdling battle cry, this huge and ferocious bird Pokémon goes out on the hunt. It blasts lakes with shock waves, then scoops up any prey that float to the water's surface.
flavorTextZh: 性格粗暴、血气方刚， 因此被钢铠鸦夺走了 伽勒尔运送员的地位。

name: vullaby
flavorText: Vullaby grow quickly. Bones that have gotten too small for older Vullaby to wear often get passed down to younger ones in the nest.
flavorTextZh: 由于很快就会长大， 屁股上的骸骨会接着传给 巢里更小的秃鹰丫头用。

name: mandibuzz
flavorText: They adorn themselves with bones. There seem to be fashion trends among them, as different bones come into and fall out of popularity.
flavorTextZh: 把捡来的骨头装饰在身上。 在骨头形状这方面 似乎也是有流行趋势的。

name: heatmor
flavorText: A flame serves as its tongue, melting through the hard shell of Durant so that Heatmor can devour their insides.
flavorTextZh: 将火焰当成舌头来使用。 会一点一点地熔化铁蚁 坚硬的外骨骼，然后把它吃掉。

name: durant
flavorText: With their large mandibles, these Pokémon can crunch their way through rock. They work together to protect their eggs from Sandaconda.
flavorTextZh: 巨大的颚部能咬碎岩石。 为了不让沙螺蟒把蛋抢走， 会和其他同类一起并肩战斗。

name: deino
flavorText: Because it can’t see, this Pokémon is constantly biting at everything it touches, trying to keep track of its surroundings.
flavorTextZh: 因为眼睛看不见， 所以会又撞又咬， 来判断四周的状况。

name: zweilous
flavorText: Their two heads will fight each other over a single piece of food. Zweilous are covered in scars even without battling others.
flavorTextZh: ２个头会争抢同一个食物。 明明没有去和别人战斗， 却总是遍体鳞伤。

name: hydreigon
flavorText: The three heads take turns sinking their teeth into the opponent. Their attacks won’t slow until their target goes down.
flavorTextZh: ３个头会轮流去咬敌人。 在对方倒下之前， 绝对不会停止攻击。

name: larvesta
flavorText: Larvesta’s body is warm all over. It spouts fire from the tips of its horns to intimidate predators and scare prey.
flavorTextZh: 全身都相当温暖。 会从角的尖端喷出火焰， 借此威吓天敌或猎物。

name: volcarona
flavorText: This Pokémon emerges from a cocoon formed of raging flames. Ancient murals depict Volcarona as a deity of fire.
flavorTextZh: 从熊熊燃烧的火焰之茧中 诞生。在古代的壁画上 被描绘为火之神。

name: cobalion
flavorText: From the moment it’s born, this Pokémon radiates the air of a leader. Its presence will calm even vicious foes.
flavorTextZh: 生来就具有领导风范。 即使是性格狂暴的宝可梦， 在勾帕路翁面前也会变得温顺。

name: terrakion
flavorText: In Unovan legend, Terrakion battled against humans in an effort to protect other Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 代拉基翁为保护宝可梦 而与人类作战的传说 在合众地区广为流传。

name: virizion
flavorText: It darts around opponents with a flurry of quick movements, slicing them up with its horns.
flavorTextZh: 以敏捷的身手像旋风一般将敌人 玩弄于股掌之中，会用锋利的角 毫不留情地切斩对手。

name: tornadus-incarnate
flavorText: This storm-stirring Pokémon is said to cause the seasons to turn by whipping up the air. I suspect its humanlike form to be a false one.

name: thundurus-incarnate
flavorText: They say this wielder of electricity has waged war with its nemesis, Tornadus, since time immemorial. The lightning bolts it hurls pierce the very earth and enrich the soil.

name: reshiram
flavorText: According to myth, if people ignore truth and let themselves become consumed by greed, Reshiram will arrive to burn their kingdoms down.
flavorTextZh: 在神话的叙述里，如果人类 蔑视真实、放纵欲望，它就会 用火焰烧尽他们的王国。

name: zekrom
flavorText: Mythology tells us that if people lose the righteousness in their hearts, their kingdoms will be razed by Zekrom’s lightning.
flavorTextZh: 在神话的描述里，如果人类 失去了正义之心，它就会用 狂暴的雷电毁灭他们的王国。

name: landorus-incarnate
flavorText: When the incarnations of wind and of lightning clash, Landorus arrives to quell the conflict. After the tempests and thunderbolts abate, the land is sure to be blessed with bountiful harvests.

name: kyurem
flavorText: It appears that this Pokémon uses its powers over ice to freeze its own body in order to stabilize its cellular structure.
flavorTextZh: 为了稳定细胞组织， 它似乎用自己制造出 的冷气冰冻着身体。

name: keldeo-ordinary
flavorText: They say that Keldeo must survive harsh battles and fully develop the horn on its forehead before this Pokémon’s true power will awaken.
flavorTextZh: 据说当它挺过了艰难的战斗， 额头上的角就能得到锻炼， 从而激发出自己真正的力量。

name: meloetta-aria
flavorText: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

name: genesect
flavorText: This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.

name: chespin
flavorText: Such a thick shell of wood covers its head and back that even a direct hit from a truck wouldn’t faze it.

name: quilladin
flavorText: They strengthen their lower bodies by running into one another. They are very kind and won’t start fights.

name: chesnaught
flavorText: When it takes a defensive posture with its fists guarding its face, it could withstand a bomb blast.

name: fennekin
flavorText: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

name: braixen
flavorText: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.

name: delphox
flavorText: Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.

name: froakie
flavorText: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: frogadier
flavorText: Its swiftness is unparalleled. It can scale a tower of more than 2,000 feet in a minute’s time.

name: greninja
flavorText: It appears and vanishes with a ninja’s grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

name: bunnelby
flavorText: It’s very sensitive to danger. The sound of Corviknight’s flapping will have Bunnelby digging a hole to hide underground in moments.
flavorTextZh: 对危险很敏感。只要听到 钢铠鸦拍打翅膀的声音， 就会马上挖洞钻进地下藏身。

name: diggersby
flavorText: The fur on its belly retains heat exceptionally well. People used to make heavy winter clothing from fur shed by this Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 肚子上的体毛保温性能优秀。 在过去，人们会用它的落毛 来制作保暖服装。

name: fletchling
flavorText: When this Pokémon gets excited, its body temperature increases sharply. If you touch a Fletchling with bare hands, you might get burned.
flavorTextZh: 一旦兴奋体温就会 急剧上升。赤手去摸 甚至有可能会被灼伤。

name: fletchinder
flavorText: Fletchinder are exceedingly territorial and aggressive. These Pokémon fight among themselves over feeding grounds.
flavorTextZh: 领地意识很强，性格好战。 火箭雀彼此之间会为了 觅食的地方发生争斗。

name: talonflame
flavorText: Talonflame dives toward prey at speeds of up to 310 mph and assaults them with powerful kicks, giving the prey no chance to escape.
flavorTextZh: 会以５００公里的时速进行突击。 不给猎物留下逃跑的机会， 直接以猛烈的踢击将其解决。

name: scatterbug
flavorText: The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.

name: spewpa
flavorText: The beaks of bird Pokémon can’t begin to scratch its stalwart body. To defend itself, it spews powder.

name: vivillon
flavorText: The patterns on this Pokémon’s wings depend on the climate and topography of its habitat. It scatters colorful scales.

name: litleo
flavorText: This hot-blooded Pokémon is filled with curiosity. When it gets angry or starts fighting, its short mane gets hot.
flavorTextZh: 血气方刚且好奇心旺盛。 如果生气或是开始战斗， 短短的鬃毛就会变热。

name: pyroar-male
flavorText: The temperature of its breath is over 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, but Pyroar doesn’t use it on its prey. This Pokémon prefers to eat raw meat.
flavorTextZh: 会吐出摄氏６０００度的气息， 但不会用于猎物。 因为更喜欢吃生的肉。

name: flabebe
flavorText: Flabébé wears a crown made from pollen it’s collected from its flower. The crown has hidden healing properties.
flavorTextZh: 头上的冠是收集花粉做成的。 蕴藏着治愈的效果。

name: floette
flavorText: It gives its own power to flowers, pouring its heart into caring for them. Floette never forgives anyone who messes up a flower bed.
flavorTextZh: 把自己的力量给花，用心地照料。 绝不原谅那些破坏花坛者。

name: florges
flavorText: Its life can span several hundred years. It’s said to devote its entire life to protecting gardens.
flavorTextZh: 拥有几百年的寿命。 据说会终其一生不断地守护着庭园。

name: skiddo
flavorText: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.

name: gogoat
flavorText: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.

name: pancham
flavorText: Wanting to make sure it’s taken seriously, Pancham’s always giving others a glare. But if it’s not focusing, it ends up smiling.
flavorTextZh: 为了不被小看而一直瞪着对手， 然而绷紧的神经一旦稍有放松， 它就会在无意中露出笑脸。

name: pangoro
flavorText: Using its leaf, Pangoro can predict the moves of its opponents. It strikes with punches that can turn a dump truck into scrap with just one hit.
flavorTextZh: 通过叶子来洞悉敌人的动向。 只要使出一记拳击就能 让大型翻斗车变成废铁。

name: furfrou
flavorText: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.
flavorTextZh: 如果置之不理， 体毛会不断地长长， 但只允许信赖的人修剪。

name: espurr
flavorText: There’s enough psychic power in Espurr to send a wrestler flying, but because this power can’t be controlled, Espurr finds it troublesome.
flavorTextZh: 虽然拥有可以弹飞 职业摔角手的精神力量， 却因无法好好控制而感到烦恼。

name: meowstic-male
flavorText: The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.
flavorTextZh: 雄性的防卫本能很强， 在保护自己和伙伴时 能发挥最大的威力。

name: honedge
flavorText: The blue eye on the sword’s handguard is the true body of Honedge. With its old cloth, it drains people’s lives away.
flavorTextZh: 独剑鞘剑格上的 蓝色眼珠是它的本体。 会用陈旧的布吸取人类的精气。

name: doublade
flavorText: The two swords employ a strategy of rapidly alternating between offense and defense to bring down their prey.
flavorTextZh: ２把剑会用令人眼花缭乱的 速度不断交替攻击和防御， 借以制服猎物。

name: aegislash-shield
flavorText: Its potent spectral powers allow it to manipulate others. It once used its powers to force people and Pokémon to build a kingdom to its liking.
flavorTextZh: 坚盾剑怪曾经用强大的灵力 控制人和宝可梦，建立了 适合自己生活的国家。

name: spritzee
flavorText: The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee.
flavorTextZh: 身上飘出的香气 能让人们神魂颠倒。 贵妇们对它钟爱万分。

name: aromatisse
flavorText: The scents Aromatisse can produce range from sweet smells that bolster allies to foul smells that sap an opponent’s will to fight.
flavorTextZh: 会发出恶臭让敌人丧失战意， 或者发出芳香的味道 来帮助自己的伙伴。

name: swirlix
flavorText: The sweet smell of cotton candy perfumes Swirlix’s fluffy fur. This Pokémon spits out sticky string to tangle up its enemies.
flavorTextZh: 蓬松的体毛闻起来 就像棉花糖一样甜甜的。 会放出黏糊糊的丝缠住敌人。

name: slurpuff
flavorText: Slurpuff’s fur contains a lot of air, making it soft to the touch and lighter than it looks.
flavorTextZh: 因为体毛里富含空气， 所以摸起来十分柔软， 重量也比看起来要轻。

name: inkay
flavorText: By exposing foes to the blinking of its luminescent spots, Inkay demoralizes them, and then it seizes the chance to flee.
flavorTextZh: 会让敌人看到自己闪烁的 发光体来让对方丧失战意， 然后趁机逃之夭夭。

name: malamar
flavorText: It’s said that Malamar’s hypnotic powers played a role in certain history-changing events.
flavorTextZh: 据说那些能够改变历史 的重大事件其实都和 乌贼王的催眠能力有关。

name: binacle
flavorText: If the two don’t work well together, both their offense and defense fall apart. Without good teamwork, they won’t survive.
flavorTextZh: 如果２只龟脚脚配合得不好， 不但无法有效地攻击和防御， 甚至没办法生存下去。

name: barbaracle
flavorText: Having an eye on each palm allows it to keep watch in all directions. In a pinch, its limbs start to act on their own to ensure the enemy’s defeat.
flavorTextZh: 用手掌上的眼珠来观察 前后左右的状况。遇上危机时 手脚会自己动起来打倒对手。

name: skrelp
flavorText: Skrelp looks like a piece of rotten seaweed, so it can blend in with seaweed drifting on the ocean and avoid being detected by enemies.
flavorTextZh: 看上去很像腐烂的海藻， 因此会藏身于漂在海里的 碎藻中，骗过敌人的眼睛。

name: dragalge
flavorText: Dragalge generates dragon energy by sticking the plume on its head out above the ocean’s surface and bathing it in sunlight.
flavorTextZh: 会通过将头上的伞状部分 伸出海面吸收阳光的方式， 在体内制造龙之能量。

name: clauncher
flavorText: By detonating gas that accumulates in its right claw, this Pokémon launches water like a bullet. This is how Clauncher defeats its enemies.
flavorTextZh: 通过引爆积蓄在右臂钳子中的 气体，像发射子弹般 将水喷射出去，击倒敌人。

name: clawitzer
flavorText: Clawitzer’s right arm is a cannon that launches projectiles made of seawater. Shots from a Clawitzer’s cannon arm can sink a tanker.
flavorTextZh: 右臂是能够喷射 海水炮弹的大炮。 威力大到足以击沉油轮。

name: helioptile
flavorText: The sun powers this Pokémon’s electricity generation. Interruption of that process stresses Helioptile to the point of weakness.
flavorTextZh: 拥有太阳能发电的结构。 如果有人打扰它发电， 它就会因心理压力而衰弱。

name: heliolisk
flavorText: One Heliolisk basking in the sun with its frill outspread is all it would take to produce enough electricity to power a city.
flavorTextZh: 如果展开颈伞沐浴阳光， 单凭１只光电伞蜥就能 制造出大城市所需的电力。

name: tyrunt
flavorText: This Pokémon is selfish and likes to be pampered. It can also inflict grievous wounds on its Trainer just by playing around.
flavorTextZh: 又任性又爱撒娇。 即使它只是闹着玩， 也会让训练家受重伤。

name: tyrantrum
flavorText: A single bite of Tyrantrum’s massive jaws will demolish a car. This Pokémon was the king of the ancient world.
flavorTextZh: 如果被它的大颚咬到， 连汽车都会变得粉碎。 是古代世界的王者。

name: amaura
flavorText: Amaura is an ancient Pokémon that has gone extinct. Specimens of this species can sometimes be found frozen in ice.
flavorTextZh: 已经灭绝的古代宝可梦。 有时候它还会以冰封的 状态被发现喔。

name: aurorus
flavorText: When gripped by rage, Aurorus will emanate freezing air, covering everything around it in ice.
flavorTextZh: 当它被激怒时， 就会喷出猛烈的冷气， 把周围都冰封起来。

name: sylveon
flavorText: It emits a soothing aura from its ribbon-shaped organs. It wraps these appendages around quarrelers to instantly restore calm to the situation.
flavorTextZh: 伽勒尔地区的童话中有着 美丽的仙子伊布击退了 可怕的龙宝可梦的故事。

name: hawlucha
flavorText: It always strikes a pose before going for its finishing move. Sometimes opponents take advantage of that time to counterattack.
flavorTextZh: 在使出致命的绝招之前 一定要先摆出华丽的姿势。 有时也会在这一刻遭到反击。

name: dedenne
flavorText: Since Dedenne can’t generate much electricity on its own, it steals electricity from outlets or other electric Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 由于发电的能力弱， 会从插座或其他的 电气宝可梦那里偷电。

name: carbink
flavorText: It’s said that somewhere in the world, there’s a mineral vein housing a large pack of slumbering Carbink. It’s also said that this pack has a queen.
flavorTextZh: 据说在世界上的某处，有个 沉睡着许多小碎钻的矿脉， 它们的女王也在那里。

name: goomy
flavorText: Goomy hides away in the shade of trees, where it's nice and humid. If the slime coating its body dries out, the Pokémon instantly becomes lethargic.
flavorTextZh: 它的触角是优秀的感觉器官。 只要感觉到有敌人就会立刻 藏起来，以此存活到了现在。

name: sliggoo
flavorText: A creature given to melancholy. I suspect its metallic shell developed as a result of the mucus on its skin reacting with the iron in Hisui's water.
flavorTextZh: 背上的突起物里装着它 小小的脑子，里面只想着 吃饭和逃离敌人这两件事。

name: goodra
flavorText: Able to freely control the hardness of its metallic shell. It loathes solitude and is extremely clingy—it will fume and run riot if those dearest to it ever leave its side.
flavorTextZh: 用伸长角产生的力道来 攻击对手，产生的威力比 重量级拳击手的拳击还强１００倍。

name: klefki
flavorText: Klefki sucks in metal ions with the horn topping its head. It seems this Pokémon loves keys so much that its head needed to look like one, too.
flavorTextZh: 会用头的前端吸取金属离子。 之所以长得像钥匙，据说是因为 太过喜欢钥匙，情不自禁进行了模仿。

name: phantump
flavorText: With a voice like a human child’s, it cries out to lure adults deep into the forest, getting them lost among the trees.
flavorTextZh: 用类似人类小孩的声音鸣叫， 把大人引到森林的深处， 让他们在其中迷失方向。

name: trevenant
flavorText: Small roots that extend from the tips of this Pokémon’s feet can tie into the trees of the forest and give Trevenant control over them.
flavorTextZh: 脚尖伸出来的根须 能连结森林中的树木， 并且自由自在地加以操纵。

name: pumpkaboo-average
flavorText: The light that streams out from the holes in the pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people and Pokémon that see it.
flavorTextZh: 南瓜的洞里发出的光 会催眠并控制 看到它的人和宝可梦。

name: gourgeist-average
flavorText: In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist will come knocking. Whoever answers the door will be swept off to the afterlife.
flavorTextZh: 南瓜怪人会在朔月的夜里 去别人家门口敲门。开了门的人 会被它带往另一个世界。

name: bergmite
flavorText: Lives on mountains blanketed in perennial snow. It freezes water vapor in the air to make the ice helmet that it dons for defense.
flavorTextZh: 栖息在极其寒冷的地域。 会把自己的脚冻在 冰岩怪的背上固定起来。

name: avalugg
flavorText: The armor of ice covering its lower jaw puts steel to shame and can shatter rocks with ease. This Pokémon barrels along steep mountain paths, cleaving through the deep snow.
flavorTextZh: 虽然身体的裂缝会因 白天的活动而变大， 但只要一晚就能全部长好。

name: noibat
flavorText: No wavelength of sound is beyond Noibat’s ability to produce. The ultrasonic waves it generates can overcome much larger Pokémon.
flavorTextZh: 可以控制所有频率的音波。 就算是体型巨大的宝可梦， 也对它的超音波束手无策。

name: noivern
flavorText: Flying through the darkness, it weakens enemies with ultrasonic waves that could crush stone. Its fangs finish the fight.
flavorTextZh: 在黑暗中一边飞行一边发出 能粉碎岩石的超音波痛击敌人， 然后用利齿给予致命的一击。

name: xerneas
flavorText: When the horns on its head shine in seven colors, it is said to be sharing everlasting life.

name: yveltal
flavorText: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

name: zygarde-50
flavorText: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.
flavorTextZh: 据说，在与威胁到生态系统者战斗时， 它会变化为更强大的样子。

name: diancie
flavorText: It can instantly create many diamonds by compressing the carbon in the air between its hands.

name: hoopa
flavorText: It is said to be able to seize anything it desires with its six rings and six huge arms. With its power sealed, it is transformed into a much smaller form.

name: volcanion
flavorText: It expels its internal steam from the arms on its back. It has enough power to blow away a mountain.

name: rowlet
flavorText: Flies noiselessly on delicate wings. It has mastered the art of deftly launching dagger-sharp feathers from those same wings.
flavorTextZh: 白天利用光合作用积蓄力量， 到了晚上则会悄无声息地 在空中飞翔，寻找猎物。

name: dartrix
flavorText: Regularly basks in sunlight to gather power—presumably due to the frigid climate. Nonetheless, the edges of the blade quills set into its wings are keen as ever.
flavorTextZh: 对整理翅膀丝毫不会怠慢。 这不单是因为它注重形象， 也是为了让刃羽保持锐利。

name: decidueye
flavorText: The air stored inside the rachises of Decidueye's feathers insulates the Pokémon against Hisui's extreme cold. This is firm proof that evolution can be influenced by environment.
flavorTextZh: 只要０.１秒就可以在翅膀的 藤蔓上搭好箭羽、射向敌人， 并在敌人发现前贯穿其要害。

name: litten
flavorText: Trying to pet Litten before it trusts you will result in a nasty scratch from its sharp claws. Be careful.
flavorTextZh: 如果在得到火斑喵的 信任前就想抚摸它的话， 要小心它用尖锐的爪子抓你。

name: torracat
flavorText: When facing a powerful enemy, Torracat’s fighting spirit gets pumped up, and its fire bell blazes hotter.
flavorTextZh: 如果敌人实力强劲， 它便会更有战斗的欲望， 火焰铃铛的火力也会随之上升。

name: incineroar
flavorText: Incineroar’s rough and aggressive behavior is its most notable trait, but the way it helps out small Pokémon shows that it has a kind side as well.
flavorTextZh: 虽然行为举止十分粗野， 却也有着会去帮助 弱小宝可梦的温柔一面。

name: popplio
flavorText: If Popplio want to create big, powerful balloons, they must be persistent. It takes daily practice for these Pokémon to develop their skills.
flavorTextZh: 每天拼命地练习， 才终于能够制造出 又大又好用的气球。

name: brionne
flavorText: On nights when the sea is calm, Brionne dance with one another to the singing of the Primarina that’s leading them.
flavorTextZh: 到了风平浪静的夜晚， 会配合领队西狮海壬的歌声 和伙伴们一起跳舞。

name: primarina
flavorText: For Primarina, every battle’s a stage. Its singing and the dancing of its balloons will mesmerize the audience.
flavorTextZh: 对战就是西狮海壬的舞台。 它那歌声和舞动气球的样子 使观战的人们为之倾倒。

name: pikipek
flavorText: It may look spindly, but its neck muscles are heavy-duty. It can peck at a tree 16 times per second!
flavorTextZh: 拥有看着很细， 却很强韧的颈部肌肉。 能以每秒１６连击的速度猛啄树木。

name: trumbeak
flavorText: From its mouth, it fires the seeds of berries it has eaten. The scattered seeds give rise to new plants.
flavorTextZh: 会将吃掉的树果种子从 口中射出。种子散落在大地上， 新的草木便会生长出来。

name: toucannon
flavorText: Known for forming harmonious couples, this Pokémon is brought to wedding ceremonies as a good luck charm.
flavorTextZh: 因成双成对感情和睦而闻名。 它被视为一种吉祥的象征， 常被带到结婚仪式去。

name: yungoos
flavorText: Although it will eat anything, it prefers fresh living things, so it marches down streets in search of prey.
flavorTextZh: 什么都吃，但喜欢吃新鲜的活物。 所以会为了寻找猎物在路上四处游走。

name: gumshoos
flavorText: Patient by nature, this Pokémon loses control of itself and pounces when it spots its favorite meal—Rattata!
flavorTextZh: 忍耐力非常强， 但如果见到它爱吃的小拉达， 就会忘乎所以地扑过去。

name: grubbin
flavorText: It uses its big jaws to dig nests into the forest floor, and it loves to feed on sweet tree sap.
flavorTextZh: 会用巨大的颚部 在森林中挖地制造巢穴。 最喜欢甜甜的树汁。

name: charjabug
flavorText: Its digestive processes convert the leaves it eats into electricity. An electric sac in its belly stores the electricity for later use.
flavorTextZh: 虫电宝消化吃掉的落叶时 会产生电能。它会把这些电能 储存在自己肚子上的电囊中。

name: vikavolt
flavorText: If it carries a Charjabug to use as a spare battery, a flying Vikavolt can rapidly fire high-powered beams of electricity.
flavorTextZh: 如果它在飞翔时把虫电宝抱住 当作备用电池，就能连续发射 电力超高的电磁光束。

name: crabrawler
flavorText: Crabrawler has been known to mistake Exeggutor for a coconut tree and climb it. The enraged Exeggutor shakes it off and stomps it.
flavorTextZh: 有时会把椰蛋树错认为椰子树 而爬上去。惹怒椰蛋树后 被抖落下来，并遭到踩踏。

name: crabominable
flavorText: Before it stops to think, it just starts pummeling. There are records of its turning back avalanches with a flurry of punches.
flavorTextZh: 比起思考，会先试着打打看。 曾经有过用拳头猛攻 打退雪崩的记录。

name: oricorio-baile
flavorText: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.
flavorTextZh: 吸食了朱红色花蜜的花舞鸟。 训练家弄错指示的话就会非常生气。 是情感变化非常剧烈的家伙。

name: cutiefly
flavorText: An opponent’s aura can tell Cutiefly what that opponent’s next move will be. Then Cutiefly can glide around the attack and strike back.
flavorTextZh: 从敌人散发出的气场 来判断对方下一步的行动。 能轻盈地躲开攻击并进行反击。

name: ribombee
flavorText: Ribombee absolutely hate getting wet or rained on. In the cloudy Galar region, they are very seldom seen.
flavorTextZh: 最讨厌雨水弄湿自己。 因为伽勒尔地区阴天居多， 所以很难见得到它的身影。

name: rockruff
flavorText: This Pokémon intimidates opponents by striking the ground with the rocks on its neck. The moment an opponent flinches, Rockruff attacks.
flavorTextZh: 将脖子上的岩石向地面 发射，以此威吓对手。 在对方畏缩的刹那发起袭击。

name: lycanroc-midday
flavorText: With swift movements, this Pokémon gradually backs its prey into a corner. Lycanroc’s fangs are always aimed toward opponents’ weak spots.
flavorTextZh: 会用敏捷的动作将猎物 一点一点逼入绝境。 利齿总是瞄准着对方的要害。

name: wishiwashi-solo
flavorText: When it senses danger, its eyes tear up. The sparkle of its tears signals other Wishiwashi to gather.
flavorTextZh: 感觉到危险时眼睛就会变得湿润。 眼泪的光亮会成为召集伙伴的信号， 让许多的弱丁鱼聚在一起。

name: mareanie
flavorText: Unlike their Alolan counterparts, the Mareanie of the Galar region have not yet figured out that the branches of Corsola are delicious.
flavorTextZh: 和阿罗拉的好坏星不同， 伽勒尔的好坏星还没发现到 太阳珊瑚的枝有多好吃。

name: toxapex
flavorText: Within the poison sac in its body is a poison so toxic that Pokémon as large as Wailord will still be suffering three days after it first takes effect.
flavorTextZh: 体内的毒囊中储存着 满满的剧毒，毒性强到 能让吼鲸王都痛苦三天三夜。

name: mudbray
flavorText: It eats dirt to create mud and smears this mud all over its feet, giving them the grip needed to walk on rough terrain without slipping.
flavorTextZh: 在把自己吃土制造出的泥巴 涂在脚上之后，无论走在路况 多么差的路上都不会打滑。

name: mudsdale
flavorText: Mudsdale has so much stamina that it could carry over 10 tons across the Galar region without rest or sleep.
flavorTextZh: 拥有很强的耐力， 可以不眠不休地拉着１０吨重的 货物纵贯伽勒尔地区。

name: dewpider
flavorText: Dewpider normally lives underwater. When it comes onto land in search of food, it takes water with it in the form of a bubble on its head.
flavorTextZh: 平时生活在水中， 也会戴上水泡去 陆地上寻找食物。

name: araquanid
flavorText: It acts as a caretaker for Dewpider, putting them inside its bubble and letting them eat any leftover food.
flavorTextZh: 把滴蛛放进头上的水泡里， 一边喂它吃剩的食物， 一边照顾它。

name: fomantis
flavorText: During the day, Fomantis basks in sunlight and sleeps peacefully. It wakes and moves around at night.
flavorTextZh: 白天沐浴阳光， 呼呼大睡。到了半夜 才醒来并开始活动。

name: lurantis
flavorText: The petals on this Pokémon’s arms are thin and super sharp, and they can fire laser beams if Lurantis gathers light first.
flavorTextZh: 双臂的花瓣既薄 又锋利。还能够 积蓄阳光发射光束。

name: morelull
flavorText: Morelull live in forests that stay dark even during the day. They scatter flickering spores that put enemies to sleep.
flavorTextZh: 白天也生活在昏暗的森林里。 会一边闪烁一边散播发光的孢子 来让敌人陷入沉睡。

name: shiinotic
flavorText: If you see a light deep in a forest at night, don’t go near. Shiinotic will make you fall fast asleep.
flavorTextZh: 如果大半夜在森林的深处 看见光亮，记住千万不要接近。 灯罩夜菇会让你睡着的。

name: salandit
flavorText: This sneaky Pokémon will slink behind its prey and immobilize it with poisonous gas before the prey even realizes Salandit is there.
flavorTextZh: 悄悄地从背后靠近猎物， 在对方察觉之前释放毒气， 让对方动弹不得。

name: salazzle
flavorText: The winner of competitions between Salazzle is decided by which one has the most male Salandit with it.
flavorTextZh: 据说焰后蜥之间在争斗时， 是通过比拼谁带着更多只 雄性夜盗火蜥来定胜负的。

name: stufful
flavorText: The way it protects itself by flailing its arms may be an adorable sight, but stay well away. This is flailing that can snap thick tree trunks.
flavorTextZh: 为了保护自己的身体而 胡乱挥舞前脚的样子虽然可爱， 威力却大到能将大树折断。

name: bewear
flavorText: The moves it uses to take down its prey would make a martial artist jealous. It tucks subdued prey under its arms to carry them to its nest.
flavorTextZh: 会用令格斗家都无地自容的技术 把逮住的猎物夹在腋下， 带回自己的住处。

name: bounsweet
flavorText: When under attack, it secretes a sweet and delicious sweat. The scent only calls more enemies to it.
flavorTextZh: 受到袭击时流下的汗水 非常甜美可口。那种香气 会吸引更多敌人的注意。

name: steenee
flavorText: Any Corvisquire that pecks at this Pokémon will be greeted with a smack from its sepals followed by a sharp kick.
flavorTextZh: 会用头部的壳盖击打 飞来啄食自己的蓝鸦， 并且对它使出猛烈的踢击。

name: tsareena
flavorText: A kick from the hardened tips of this Pokémon’s legs leaves a wound in the opponent’s body and soul that will never heal.
flavorTextZh: 用又尖又硬的脚尖施展脚踢， 朝对手的身体和心灵 留下无法磨灭的创伤。

name: comfey
flavorText: These Pokémon smell very nice. All Comfey wear different flowers, so each of these Pokémon has its own individual scent.
flavorTextZh: 散发着迷人香气的宝可梦。 由于每只花疗环环身上的花都 不一样，所以香味也各不相同。

name: oranguru
flavorText: It knows the forest inside and out. If it comes across a wounded Pokémon, Oranguru will gather medicinal herbs to treat it.
flavorTextZh: 对森林的各个角落都了如指掌。 如果有宝可梦受伤了， 就会去寻找药草为它们治疗。

name: passimian
flavorText: Passimian live in groups of about 20, with each member performing an assigned role. Through cooperation, the group survives.
flavorTextZh: ２０几只形成团队来生活。 靠着每个成员明确的分工， 在严苛的大自然中生存下来。

name: wimpod
flavorText: Wimpod gather in swarms, constantly on the lookout for danger. They scatter the moment they detect an enemy’s presence.
flavorTextZh: 成群聚集，随时提高警惕。 只要察觉到有敌人， 就会分散开来四处逃窜。

name: golisopod
flavorText: They live in sunken ships or in holes in the seabed. When Golisopod and Grapploct battle, the loser becomes the winner’s meal.
flavorTextZh: 生活在海底的洞窟或沉船里。 会去和八爪武师决战， 输掉的一方便会成为对方的食物。

name: sandygast
flavorText: Sandygast mainly inhabits beaches. It takes control of anyone who puts their hand into its mouth, forcing them to make its body bigger.
flavorTextZh: 主要栖息在沙滩上。 操纵把手伸进自己嘴里的 对手，从而让自己变得更大。

name: palossand
flavorText: This Pokémon lives on beaches, but it hates water. Palossand can’t maintain its castle-like shape if it gets drenched by a heavy rain.
flavorTextZh: 虽然住在沙滩上，但是 讨厌水。要是淋了大雨， 就无法维持城堡的造型。

name: pyukumuku
flavorText: It lives in warm, shallow waters. If it encounters a foe, it will spit out its internal organs as a means to punch them.
flavorTextZh: 覆盖着皮肤的粘液 具有出众的保湿效果， 即使在陆地上待好几天也不会干掉。

name: type-null
flavorText: It was modeled after a mighty Pokémon of myth. The mask placed upon it limits its power in order to keep it under control.
flavorTextZh: 以神话中的宝可梦为原型所 创造出的宝可梦，被戴上了 抑制力量失控的面罩。

name: silvally
flavorText: The final factor needed to release this Pokémon’s true power was a strong bond with a Trainer it trusts.
flavorTextZh: 与所信赖的训练家之间的牵绊 是解放它真正力量的 最后一个要素。

name: minior-red-meteor
flavorText: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.
flavorTextZh: 外壳非常坚固，但落到地上的 冲击会让它碎成细屑。

name: komala
flavorText: It remains asleep from birth to death as a result of the sedative properties of the leaves that form its diet.
flavorTextZh: 到死都一直是睡着的状态， 是因为吃的叶子里含有 类似麻醉药的成分。

name: turtonator
flavorText: Eating sulfur in its volcanic habitat is what causes explosive compounds to develop in its shell. Its droppings are also dangerously explosive.
flavorTextZh: 在火山上生活，吃下的硫磺 就是甲壳上炸药的原料。 连粪便也会爆炸，十分危险。

name: togedemaru
flavorText: When it’s in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.
flavorTextZh: 在危急时刻会把身体卷成一团， 倒竖起背上的尖刺， 不分青红皂白地发出电击。

name: mimikyu-disguised
flavorText: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.
flavorTextZh: 有一位学者为了研究 而看了它的破布里面， 结果患上怪病而离开人世。

name: bruxish
flavorText: Its skin is thick enough to fend off Mareanie’s spikes. With its robust teeth, Bruxish crunches up the spikes and eats them.
flavorTextZh: 厚实的皮肤连好坏星的针 也穿不透。会用结实的牙齿 嘎嘣嘎嘣地咬碎针吃下去。

name: drampa
flavorText: Drampa is a kind and friendly Pokémon—up until it’s angered. When that happens, it stirs up a gale and flattens everything around.
flavorTextZh: 心地善良爱亲近人， 但只要生气就会 刮起强风吹倒一切。

name: dhelmise
flavorText: After lowering its anchor, it waits for its prey. It catches large Wailord and drains their life-force.
flavorTextZh: 把锚抛到海里，伏击猎物。 会去捕捉巨大的吼鲸王， 吸取它们的精气。

name: jangmo-o
flavorText: Jangmo-o strikes its scales to communicate with others of its kind. Its scales are actually fur that’s become as hard as metal.
flavorTextZh: 体毛变成了像金属一般 坚硬的鳞片。通过敲击 鳞片来和伙伴交流。

name: hakamo-o
flavorText: Before attacking its enemies, it clashes its scales together and roars. Its sharp claws shred the opposition.
flavorTextZh: 敲响鳞片，发出吼声， 接着向对手发起挑战， 并用锋利的爪子撕裂对手。

name: kommo-o
flavorText: Certain ruins have paintings of ancient warriors wearing armor made of Kommo-o scales.
flavorTextZh: 遗迹壁画中古代战士 身上穿着的盔甲是用 杖尾鳞甲龙的鳞片制成的。

name: tapu-koko
flavorText: The lightning-wielding guardian deity of Melemele, Tapu Koko is brimming with curiosity and appears before people from time to time.
flavorTextZh: 操纵雷的美乐美乐的守护神。 好奇心旺盛， 会时不时在人们面前现身。

name: tapu-lele
flavorText: Although called a guardian deity, Tapu Lele is devoid of guilt about its cruel disposition and can be described as nature incarnate.
flavorTextZh: 被称为守护神，却兼有 天真无邪与残酷的性格， 被誉为自然的化身。

name: tapu-bulu
flavorText: It makes ringing sounds with its tail to let others know where it is, avoiding unneeded conflicts. This guardian deity of Ula’ula controls plants.
flavorTextZh: 会鸣响尾巴，告知自己的居所， 以避免不必要的战争。 是操纵草木的乌拉乌拉的守护神。

name: tapu-fini
flavorText: Although it’s called a guardian deity, terrible calamities sometimes befall those who recklessly approach Tapu Fini.
flavorTextZh: 被称为守护神，但有时会给 随便靠近的对方带去恐怖的灾难。

name: cosmog
flavorText: Cosmog is very curious but not very cautious, often placing itself in danger. If things start to look dicey, it teleports away.
flavorTextZh: 没有警戒心且好奇心强， 所以经常会遇到麻烦。 危急时会用瞬间移动来逃跑。

name: cosmoem
flavorText: It sucks in dust from the air at an astounding rate, frantically building up energy within its core as preparation for evolution.
flavorTextZh: 以惊人的气势吸入 大气中的尘埃，努力用 内核制造着进化的能源。

name: solgaleo
flavorText: Solgaleo was once known as the Beast That Devours the Sun. Energy in the form of light radiates boundlessly from it.
flavorTextZh: 曾经被称为 吞食太阳之兽。 能释放出无尽的光能。

name: lunala
flavorText: It steals the light from its surroundings and then becomes the full moon, showering its own light across the night sky.
flavorTextZh: 夺走四周所有的光， 自己则变身为满月的模样， 在黑夜中散发出光芒。

name: nihilego
